comment.body:
ATTENTION!☝️☝️☝️
 Especially vol traders like @Trader McGraw @CMik and others...
Here you see, the smirk on SPX (I watch SPX bcs SPY relies on it too)
..
As you can see vol is pretty much bid on both wings. Even tho my stochvol models expect vol to increase, it is estimated like ~33% higher than it should be rational. 
Due to vanna, the deltas are bid pretty much on OTM contracts. 
I will short the smirk into Friday via 10-15 delta contracts now.

comment.body:
i think so... i like it around the centroid (~14.8 - 15 delta) in order to catch the most vomma and veta decay as possible...
vomma goes from like 22/20 deltas towards the tails, veta is the opposite but slightly, so this way i think its fine, but don't expect too much decay

comment.body: You can come up but it's easier to use an LLM.  I ask chat GPT to remember my script as the base script. I then tell it that I will send it a narrative each morning and to update the script with only the data points of that narrative (Some days she provides different values than others).  I then manually check that the trading view lines are identical to what Alma provides.  I read, reread, then read again her narrative and make trading decisions based on that and the levels throughout the day.
